This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

must_detect.matched_text:
Ms. Talia Ren, Privacy Officer, talia.ren@pioneerspringshb.com
Banking/GLBA scope: HSA custodial data included masked routing numbers and last-4 account digits; GLBA Safeguards compliance team led by Mr. Eldon Voss will notify the OCC liaison after counsel review
MNPI considerations: Prior to public disclosure, Mr. Jonas Pike (sell-side analyst at Lanyon Ridge Capital) was wall-crossed under NDA on 2026-06-04 at 10:30 ET regarding potential earnings impact and outage duration; Insider List v1.2 attached (employees and advisors only)
Reg FD/Selective disclosure: No other analysts or investors have been briefed; we will furnish an Item 8.01 Form 8-K within two business days and host a public webcast; until then, a company-wide blackout window remains in effect through 2026-06-12 for PSHB common stock and options
Information barriers: The Digital Assets Pilot Team (stablecoin HSA disbursement wallet) and Corporate Sustainability Office are ring-fenced; do not discuss pilot wallet custody vendors or provisional 2026 carbon-offset purchase terms outside need-to-know
Commercial terms at issue (non-public): draft agreement with Cascade Custody Network to provide SOC 2 Type II crypto wallet custody at 9 bps AUC and with GreenFoundry Credits for 50,000 tCO2e offsets at $7.85/ton; both subject to Board approval
Operations status: HSA portal functionality restored at ~80% capacity; downtime < 6 hours; no patient care systems were affected and claims adjudication continues under normal SLAs
Equity impact preview (internal only): management estimates $1.8–$2.2M in one-time remediation expenses, not yet reflected in external guidance; Finance to update Q2 MD&A if threshold met
Tipping risk reminder: Do not discuss the incident, ESG offsets, or crypto wallet vendors with friends, family, or industry contacts; route media and investor inquiries to IR at ir@pioneerspringshb.com
Training note (benign): The Marketing team’s June newsletter will include a general education article on ransomware and information barriers using hypothetical bank-and-hospital examples; this content contains no incident data and is not MNPI
Customer communications: Draft notices will address affected members by name and email only; we will not include diagnosis details or account balances; inquiries to compliance@pioneerspringshb.com
Next steps: Outside counsel (Sunridge & Fell LLP) to finalize Reg FD script, CISO to deliver root-cause report by 2026-06-08, and Audit Chair Dr. Naya Torval to convene a special session; report inconsistencies to hotline 877-555-0142
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
